ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category (e.g., Latino, White, Asian) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 0-17, 18-24, 25-44, 45-64, 65+) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity (e.g., Asian, Black or African American, American Indian or Alaska Native) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of Covid-19 cases in the demographic category */,
  "percent_cases" REAL /* Percentage of Covid-19 cases in the demographic category */,
  "population_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the demographic category in the state's population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of case report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the case data (e.g., hospital, clinic, public health agency) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test used to diagnose the case (e.g., PCR, antigen, antibody) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Number of Covid-19 deaths in the demographic category */,
  "percent_deaths" REAL /* Percentage of Covid-19 deaths in the demographic category */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of death report */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Underlying cause of death (e.g., Covid-19, other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_deaths" (
  "case_death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combined case and death record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of Covid-19 cases in the demographic category */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Number of Covid-19 deaths in the demographic category */,
  "percent_cases" REAL /* Percentage of Covid-19 cases in the demographic category */,
  "percent_deaths" REAL /* Percentage of Covid-19 deaths in the demographic category */,
  "population_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the demographic category in the state's population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of combined case and death report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_deaths_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., changes made, data exported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the export */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data (e.g., number of rows, file size in bytes) */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
